name: taskdisc-actionable-backlog-pass
description: T2 canned-runner fixture: open issues are labeled or milestoned and carry real bodies, so taskdisc.actionable_backlog_items passes (>=60% actionable). Exercises the T2 pass shape end-to-end through the real engine with a no-network gh runner.

github.api repos/o/r/issues?state=open&per_page: [{"number": 1, "labels": [{"name": "bug"}], "body": "Steps to reproduce the crash on startup."}, {"number": 2, "milestone": {"title": "v1"}, "body": "Implement the CSV export endpoint behind the flag."}, {"number": 3, "labels": [{"name": "enhancement"}], "body": "Add pagination to the issues list view."}]
